analysis.reasoning: Core message: An informational announcement that the UNGA high-level week will occur, and President Putin will lead Russia’s delegation and deliver a video address on day one. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no criticism of the West or moral framing. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): Not present; no mention of multipolarity, alternative orders, or non-Western cooperation. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): Not present; no claims about peacebuilding, solidarity, or partnership. RU4 (Russian history is admirable): Not present; no historical references. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): The tweet notes Putin leading the delegation and speaking on day one, but this is standard protocol information without framing Russia as a leader in achievement; no explicit boasting or superiority, so not supported. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet is a neutral schedule announcement and does not promote any listed narrative.
